MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Robert F. Cohen, Esq., for plaintiff Citi Residential Lending. Thomas Carpio, IV, was present with settlement authority for plaintiff.
Jerome Schweich, Esq., limited scope attorney for defendant Toni Hines, who is also present.
